title: Halo-Halo Filipino Tuna Topping
description: A Filipino-inspired dessert topping using sweetened halos topped with a savory tuna mixture. This dish is perfect for hot summer days.
instructions: In a pan, heat the fish sauce over low heat if using.
Add the tuna and stir until heated through.
Add the melted cheddar cheese and stir until combined.
In a separate bowl, combine halos and tuna mixture.
Mix well and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional halos if desired.
